sources.title: PubMed User Guide
sources.locator: Search PubMed; How do I search PubMed?; article type filters; Boolean operators; Automatic Term Mapping; Search Details
sources.license: Public domain for this U.S.-government-created webpage under the NCBI copyright policy

uses.rightsBasisEvidence: The pack uses facts about PubMed search functions and independently creates its explanatory model, examples, prompts, tables, and wording; it copies no guide prose, screenshots, or interface assets.

agentAccess.notes: NCBI policy and applicable robots directives were checked before substantive access. The public help path was not disallowed, no agent-ingestion prohibition was found, and access was limited to a few ordinary HTML requests.

sources.title: Topic Searching in PubMed: Using the Medical Subject Headings (MeSH)
sources.license: Public domain for this NLM-created U.S. government webpage under NLM Web Policies

uses.rightsBasisEvidence: The pack uses only the facts that MeSH is NLM vocabulary for describing articles and that PubMed can map terms to it; all teaching expression and examples are original.

agentAccess.notes: NLM Web Policies and robots directives were checked before substantive access. The course path was not disallowed and no restriction on this limited agent reading was found.

sources.title: Bookshelf Overview
sources.license: Public domain for this NCBI-created overview under the NCBI copyright policy; deposited Bookshelf works may have separate copyright

uses.rightsBasisEvidence: The pack uses only factual descriptions of Bookshelf and its document-type coverage. It does not copy the overview's structure, images, wording, or any deposited book content.

agentAccess.notes: NCBI policy and robots directives were checked before substantive access. Only the NCBI-authored overview was read; no third-party deposited book was processed.

sources.title: Publication Characteristics (Publication Types) with Scope Notes
sources.locator: Database; Clinical Study; Evidence Synthesis; Guideline; Practice Guideline; Review; Systematic Review; Textbook scope notes
sources.license: Public domain for this NLM-created U.S. government webpage under NLM Web Policies

uses.rightsBasisEvidence: The lesson uses the functional distinctions in NLM publication-type scope notes while independently creating its decision procedure, examples, practice cases, assessment, tables, and wording.

agentAccess.notes: NLM Web Policies and robots directives were checked before substantive access. The publication-types path was not disallowed, no agent-ingestion prohibition was found, and access was limited to ordinary public HTML.

sources.title: PubMed Disclaimer
sources.locator: Database scope, selection, quality-review, liability, and endorsement sections
sources.license: Public domain for this U.S.-government-created webpage under the NCBI copyright policy

uses.rightsBasisEvidence: The pack independently explains the retrieval-versus-appraisal boundary and copies no disclaimer wording, layout, or marks.

agentAccess.notes: NCBI policy and PubMed robots directives were checked before substantive access. The disclaimer path was not disallowed and no agent-ingestion prohibition was found.
